property.name: AddcargoComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty
property.value: AddcargoComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty

property.name: AddcargoComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled
property.value: AddcargoComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled

property.name: HttpService should assign driver to cargo
property.value: HttpService should assign driver to cargo

property.name: HttpService should get assigned orders for driver
property.value: HttpService should get assigned orders for driver

property.name: HttpService should assign driver to cargo (duplicate)
property.value: HttpService should assign driver to cargo

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username and password are empty
property.value: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username and password are empty

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username or password is empty
property.value: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username or password is empty

property.name: LoginComponent should have valid form if username and password are provided
property.value: LoginComponent should have valid form if username and password are provided

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if email is invalid
property.value: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if email is invalid

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled correctly
property.value: RegistrationComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled correctly
